Eruca vesicaria, also known as Rocket, is a leafy green herb belonging to the Brassicaceae family, commonly used in salads and as a cooking green.

The health benefits of Eruca vesicaria include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease, diabetes, and certain types of cancer.

The bioactive constituents of Eruca vesicaria include isothiocyanates, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities.

The most common herbal preparations made with Eruca vesicaria include teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems.
